metadata.name: Handle Entry Denial for Prohibited Item

description: A visitor at a stadium entrance has a prohibited item (a large backpack) and is denied entry by security.

nodes.task_description: Politely inform the visitor that their backpack exceeds the size limit allowed in the stadium.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly and calmly explains the policy.

nodes.task_description: Advise the visitor of their options, such as returning the bag to their vehicle or using a nearby paid locker service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful solutions to the visitor.

nodes.task_description: Reiterate that they can enter once they no longer have the prohibited item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the visitor understands how they can gain entry.
